overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy walking through a vibrant tribal village built into massive trees, ascending wooden staircases and walkways, and reaching a scenic overlook of a tropical beach and turquoise ocean.

scene_state.functional_zone: tribal village center with ceremonial training grounds

agents.ego_description: walking through the village center past the ceremonial grounds where NPCs are training

notable_agents.action: villagers practicing combat in the ceremonial pit

entered.detail: sunken circular area with red earth and wooden spikes
vibrant tribal flags hanging between structures
wooden hut built into the tree structure
sharpened wooden stakes surrounding the ceremonial area

segments.scene_description: The protagonist walks through a vibrant tribal village center, passing a sunken ceremonial training ground with red earth where villagers practice combat. Colorful banners hang between wooden structures built into massive trees, while other villagers walk along the wooden pathways.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden staircases and rope bridges

events.description: begins ascending wooden stairs through the village
transitions from lower village to upper tree-level walkways

agents.ego_description: climbing wooden stairs and crossing rope bridges through the elevated village

notable_agents.action: companion villager leading the way up the stairs

entered.detail: enormous tree trunk with wooden platforms attached
suspension bridge made of ropes and planks
elevated wooden platforms built into the trees

segments.scene_description: The character ascends wooden staircases winding up through the village, passing massive tree trunks and crossing rope bridges. The path narrows as it climbs higher into the tree canopy, leaving the lower ceremonial grounds behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliffside path with emerging ocean views

events.description: emerges from enclosed tree village to open cliffside with ocean vista
view opens up to reveal tropical beach and turquoise water below

agents.ego_description: walking along the cliff edge path with views of the coastline opening up

notable_agents.action: villager gesturing toward the ocean view

entered.detail: distant view of turquoise ocean and coastline
defensive wooden spike walls along the path
narrow dirt trail along the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the enclosed tree village, the path opens onto a cliffside trail with expansive views of the turquoise ocean below. Wooden fortifications line the path as the character approaches the scenic overlook.

scene_state.functional_zone: scenic overlook with panoramic tropical beach view

events.description: slows and stops at the overlook to view the beach
camera pans to take in the full coastal vista

agents.ego_description: standing at the overlook admiring the tropical beach, palm trees, and distant islands

notable_agents.action: villager standing at overlook pointing at the scenery

entered.detail: sandy beach with palm trees and turquoise water
rocky outcrop serving as viewing platform

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the scenic overlook and stops to admire the panoramic view of a tropical beach with turquoise waters, palm trees, and distant misty islands. Other villagers stand nearby, gesturing toward the beautiful coastal vista.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from the heart of a vibrant tribal village into a breathtaking coastal panorama. It begins in the village center, passing a sunken ceremonial training ground of red earth and colorful banners draped between massive trees. As the character climbs, the scene shifts from the bustling ground level to winding wooden staircases and rope bridges that narrow as they rise higher into the tree canopy. The enclosed forest environment then opens onto a cliffside trail lined with wooden fortifications, where the dense foliage gives way to expansive views of the turquoise ocean. Finally, the camera reaches a scenic overlook, revealing a panoramic vista of a tropical beach with palm trees and distant misty islands.
